grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Clearly states 'The 4-Year Rule: Applies to operational development (such as building an extension)' and explains enforcement risk

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Addresses both options - mentions indemnity insurance for works >12 months but <4 years, and Regularisation Certificate option

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Dedicated section stating 'Building Regulations must be treated as a separate regime from planning permission'

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Explicitly lists all three rules: '4-Year Rule', '10-Year Rule', and '12-Month Rule' with explanations
